# Dropbox

The Dropbox connector for Claude connects your Dropbox files directly to Claude, so you can search, organize, save generated content, and create sharing links without switching tools. It respects your existing Dropbox permissions, and Claude only works with files you already have access to.

You can use Dropbox to:

**Find files:**  
"Search my Dropbox for the Q3 budget spreadsheet"

**Save generated content:**  
"Save this summary as a new file in my Dropbox /Projects folder"

**Share with a link:**  
"Create a shared link for /Marketing/brand-guidelines.pdf"

**Organize:**  
"Move everything in /Downloads older than 30 days into /Archive"
